news.title: Cerebras eyes US$40 billion IPO in high-stakes AI chip challenge to Nvidia
news.description: Cerebras Systems is preparing to raise up to US$4 billion in an initial public offering, targeting a valuation of about US$40 billion, in what could become one of the largest AI chip listings to date.

news.title: Walmart could be prepping a budget smart speaker with Gemini baked in
news.description: Walmart’s upcoming Onn speaker could be the first budget device with Google Gemini, bringing smarter AI to cheap hardware.

news.title: Broken links: How is academic work best judged in the brave new world of artificial intelligence?
news.description: Old metrics no longer reveal how influential research truly is in an AI-driven world, where knowledge is consumed without clicks or citations. India should stop chasing outdated benchmarks and adopt new ones that measure the impact of academic work better.
